context.projectOverview: Iteration 1 implemented Anthropic prompt caching correctly. Evaluator passed 6/7 criteria. Only C4 failed — purely a TEST-COVERAGE gap, not a code bug. The factory code already resolves and forwards the flag correctly. This retry adds the missing factory unit test ONLY.
relevantFiles: src/providers/factory.test.ts — ADD the new tests here (currently has 24 passing tests, zero promptCaching coverage)
src/providers/factory.ts (lines ~161-165) — the anthropic case already reads providerConfig.promptCaching (default true) and forwards { promptCaching } to AnthropicAdapter; DO NOT change this

src/providers/anthropic.ts — AnthropicAdapter constructor(apiKey?, opts?: { promptCaching?: boolean }); the flag is a PRIVATE field, so capture it via the constructor spy/mock rather than reading it off the instance

keyPrinciples: ESM: relative imports end in .js. consistent-type-imports. Prefix unused with _.
Follow the existing factory.test.ts structure/imports; do not regress its 24 tests.

failedCriteria.description: createClient reads promptCaching from providerConfig, defaults to enabled for anthropic, and forwards it to the AnthropicAdapter constructor — asserted by a factory unit test.
failedCriteria.feedback: The factory CODE is correct (factory.ts:161-165). The criterion fails only because src/providers/factory.test.ts has zero promptCaching coverage. Add factory unit tests that exercise the flag through createClient.
failedCriteria.expected: Two new tests in factory.test.ts: (1) createClient('anthropic', null, { apiKey: <fake key>, promptCaching: false }) constructs an AnthropicAdapter that received { promptCaching: false }; (2) createClient('anthropic', null, { apiKey: <fake key> }) with promptCaching OMITTED constructs an AnthropicAdapter that received { promptCaching: true } (the default). Because the adapter stores promptCaching privately, capture the constructor's 2nd argument via vi.spyOn or vi.mock('./anthropic.js'). Do NOT set BOBER_TEST_DETERMINISTIC (it short-circuits createClient to the stub and bypasses the adapter).

generatorFeedback: Scope this retry to factory.test.ts only. Do not modify factory.ts or anthropic.ts — they already pass. Keep the existing 24 factory tests green and the 2 flaky 37-tool-count baseline failures are the only tolerated test failures.
